subcodes.title: Words to some Druze friends, spoken on 1914-11-03
subcodes.first_line: Azrael, the Angel of death, is well-known in the Muhammadan world for his heartlessness in the face of misery and sorrow
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @angels, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @the concourse on high, @stories; anecdotes
